name: Y.S.Food Co.,Ltd.
summary: Y.S.Food Co.,Ltd. engages in the management of Chikuho Ramen directly-managed shops in Japan and internationally. The company also franchises Chikuho ramen shops; manufactures and sells food ingredients, noodles, and sauces; engages in the real estate lease business; and plans, designs, and constructs shops. Y.S.Food Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Tagawa, Japan.
